controls.title: Security Governance Baseline
controls.text: The organisation must have a designated security owner, a board-endorsed security policy, and annual security objectives with measurable targets.
controls.evidence_expectation: Security policy with board approval; security objectives; CISO/security owner appointment
controls.assessment_procedure: Verify board approval; check objectives are measurable and tracked; confirm security owner role filled

controls.title: Asset Inventory and Classification
controls.text: A current, owner-assigned asset inventory must exist covering hardware, software, data, and cloud assets. Assets must be classified by criticality and data sensitivity.
controls.evidence_expectation: Asset inventory; data classification scheme; cloud asset register; asset owner assignments
controls.assessment_procedure: Check inventory completeness by sampling; verify classification applied; confirm ownership assigned

controls.title: Vendor and Third-Party Risk
controls.text: All third parties with access to the organisation's systems or data must be assessed, contracted with security requirements, and monitored for compliance on at least an annual basis.
controls.evidence_expectation: Vendor risk assessment records; security clauses in contracts; annual reassessment evidence
controls.assessment_procedure: Sample vendor assessments; review contract security clauses; verify annual reassessment cycle

controls.title: Incident Response Capability
controls.text: A documented, tested incident response plan must be in place covering detection, containment, eradication, recovery, and post-incident review for cybersecurity incidents.
controls.evidence_expectation: Incident response plan; tabletop exercise records; incident register; lessons-learned log
controls.assessment_procedure: Review IRP currency and completeness; verify tabletop within 12 months; check incidents have lessons-learned

controls.title: Cloud Security Baseline
controls.text: Cloud environments must operate under a shared responsibility model with documented security controls covering identity, network, data protection, and logging for each cloud platform in use.
controls.evidence_expectation: Cloud security policy; shared responsibility matrix; cloud security posture management (CSPM) reports; logging configuration
controls.assessment_procedure: Review CSPM coverage; verify logging enabled across all cloud accounts; check IAM policies reviewed

controls.title: AI System Governance Baseline
controls.text: AI and machine learning systems processing business-critical or personal data must have a documented governance framework covering risk classification, bias assessment, explainability, and human oversight.
controls.evidence_expectation: AI governance policy; AI system inventory; risk classification records; model cards; human-in-the-loop process documentation
controls.assessment_procedure: Verify AI inventory complete; check risk classification applied; confirm human oversight for high-risk systems

controls.title: Penetration Testing and Vulnerability Management
controls.text: All internet-facing and critical internal systems must undergo penetration testing at least annually and after significant changes. Vulnerabilities must be tracked and remediated within defined SLAs: critical within 24h, high within 7 days, medium within 30 days.
controls.evidence_expectation: Annual penetration test report; vulnerability management policy; remediation tracking records; SLA compliance evidence; critical/high finding closure evidence
controls.assessment_procedure: Verify pentest conducted within 12 months; check scope covers all critical systems; review remediation SLA compliance; verify critical findings closed within 24h; check medium findings resolved within 30 days

controls.title: Identity and Access Management Baseline
controls.text: All systems must enforce MFA for privileged and remote access, apply least-privilege principles, review access quarterly, revoke access within 24h of role change or termination, and prohibit shared accounts.
controls.evidence_expectation: MFA enforcement evidence; access review records (last 90 days); joiners/movers/leavers process; privileged access management (PAM) implementation
controls.assessment_procedure: Verify MFA enforced for admin and remote access; sample access reviews; verify JML process SLAs met; check for dormant or shared accounts; verify PAM in place for privileged accounts

controls.title: Logging and Monitoring Baseline
controls.text: All systems must generate security-relevant logs including authentication events, privileged actions, data access, and security control changes. Logs must be centralised, tamper-evident, retained for at least 12 months, and monitored for anomalies.
controls.evidence_expectation: SIEM configuration; logging policy; log retention configuration; alerting rules; monitoring coverage matrix
controls.assessment_procedure: Verify all critical systems feeding logs to centralised SIEM; check log retention meets 12-month minimum; verify alerting configured for critical events; check log integrity mechanism; review on-call coverage
